landing.heroSubtitle:
Go beyond simple testing with AI-driven deep analysis
and real-time feedback.
landing.heroDescription:
A new dimension of AI evaluation platform that measures logical thinking and creativity,
breaking away from traditional correct-answer-finding assessments.
landing.endorsementQuote: ARISTO presents a new standard for future educational evaluation. It is the most innovative case showing how AI can be used as a tool to discover students' potential and help them grow.
landing.endorsementTitle: Head, KAIST Dept. of Brain & Cognitive Sciences
landing.featuresSubtitle: Adding fairness and depth to evaluation with ARISTO's unique AI technology.
landing.feature1Desc: Analyzes non-verbal signals such as gaze processing and facial expressions to evaluate confidence and attitude.
landing.feature2Desc: Deeply analyzes the logical structure and causal relationships of speech, not just simple keyword matching.
landing.feature3Desc: Generates deep follow-up questions by understanding the context of the student's previous answers.
landing.feature4Desc: AI proctors detect cheating in real-time and ensure a safe evaluation environment.
landing.feature5Desc: Provides a comprehensive report that includes qualitative analysis as well as quantitative scores.
landing.feature6Desc: Recommends personalized learning content to supplement weaknesses based on evaluation results.
landing.techSpec3Desc: Deep questions based on knowledge base
landing.ctaDescription: Inquire about adoption now or try the trial version.
